nodes.label: .`allIds walks the whole tree depth first`()
.`findById updateBlock removeBlock and locate operate at depth`()
.`move Into relocates a block into a container`()
.`move Split forms a new row container at the target position`()
.`move guards against dropping a container into its own descendant`()
.`wrapInContainer then unwrap is round trip at top level`()
.`extractToTopLevel hoists a nested block after its owning row`()
.`addChild and setAxis mutate a container and mark ancestor dirty`()
.`nested text edit marks the top-level ancestor dirty not the child`()
.`normalize pads weights and drops empty containers keeping single-child ones`()
